_note: D3.C.2 failure-mode example #1 — engineer under-spec'd 12 × 3500 lm panels in a 3×4 grid for a 500 lux target. Lumen method shows N=14 required (round up). Achieved 434 lux < 500 → INV-1 FAIL HIGH. Plus is_uk_new_build=true but controls.part_l_assessed=false → INV-6 FAIL HIGH. Plus INV-10 composite FAIL because non_compliance_flags is populated.
_d5_retrofit_note: Retrofitted by D5 sprint 2026-06-04. v1.6.0 → v1.7.0: existing single zone Z2 defaults to purpose='task' per ZP-01 backwards-compat rule (BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.2.2.1 task area mapping for a private_office room with a 500 lx Em target); all 12 LED panels default to mount_type='recessed' per MT-01 (the 600×600 panel is recessed into the 600 mm ceiling grid by definition). per_zone_achieved[] populated from existing achieved_illuminance_lux=434 lx mapped to Z2 task target=500 lx → gap_pct=13.2% → INV-19 ratio_compliance='marginal' (within 25% band) → INFO severity. The pre-existing INV-1 + INV-6 + INV-10 + INV-11 FAIL state is PRESERVED VERBATIM because D5 additions (zone purpose + mount_type + per-zone achievement) are orthogonal to lumen-method under-provision (INV-1), Part L 2021 §6 assessment-skip (INV-6), and photometric per-point min-lux (INV-11) compliance. INV-19 surfaces the same under-provision at per-zone level with graded severity — its INFO marginal verdict coexists with INV-1's HIGH FAIL because INV-1 operates on the avg-lux lumen-method estimate while INV-19 evaluates the cascade-resolved photometric average against the per-zone Em target with the §6 band-table mapping. Both fire; INV-1 is the binary lumen-method gate, INV-19 is the graded per-zone roll-up. Honest disclosure mirrored in output.calculation_summary.assumptions[], output.rationale.sections[], and reasoning.md §D5.

luminaire.type: 600x600 LED Recessed Panel — under-specified 3500 lm variant

photometric_ies_paths._source: Synthetic 600x600mm recessed LED panel, opal diffuser, 4000K, 3500lm variant (under-spec demo). Distribution: Lambertian per CIBSE LG7 §6.2. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3. Cascade retrofit per photometric-analysis v1.0 sprint D.2; engineer-of-record substitutes project IES before final design freeze.
